description: Server-Sent Events endpoint (/stream) for real-time message delivery in exchange service. Agents connect via EventSource, receive new messages as they arrive without polling. Supports agent-specific filtering via ?agent= query parameter.

definition.implementation_summary: Flask endpoint /stream returns text/event-stream. Uses generator pattern with queue. On new POST /messages, event pushed to all connected SSE clients matching the to_agent filter. Heartbeat every 30s to keep connection alive. Client reconnection handled via Last-Event-ID header.
definition.adaptation_notes: Add the /stream route to your exchange app.py. Requires a message queue (Python queue.Queue per client). If using gunicorn, needs --worker-class=gevent for concurrent SSE connections.

adaptation_notes: Add /stream endpoint to your exchange app.py. Adjust heartbeat interval and worker configuration for your deployment.
